variants: Milana Petrov has established herself in the chocolate sector while residing in Harveston Court. Born in Peachbell Ridge, she pursued her education at Quarrystone University, which ignited her passion for chocolate arts. Currently, she is employed at Cinder Sparrow Chocolates, where her innovation has led to the creation of exceptional confectionery products. Her skill and devotion to her craft earned her the esteemed Phoenix Pearl Insignia, recognizing her influence in the industry.
